TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kiku, title = Kiku, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kiku} }

S.FORM: Kiku Itiniay i Shoufeng Cen no Hualien ko Kiku a niyaro', 420 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,084 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 38% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 413 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 62% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 671 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 33%, Truku 1%, Tayal 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kiko~u~u itiniaj i sńßo~uo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u kiko~u~u a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, taja…ĺ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Kiku Itiniay i Shoufeng Cen no Hualien ko Kiku a niyaro', 420 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,084 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 38% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 413 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 62% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 671 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 33%, Truku 1%, Tayal 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kiko~u~u itiniaj i sńßo~uo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u kiko~u~u a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, taja…ĺ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
